titleStmt.title: SII 34.424: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 424. Paḷḷimaḍam, hamlet of Tiruchchuḻi, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the north base of the Kālanāthasvāmi temple.

summary.p: This lists the names of a number of shepherds (āyaṉ, veṭṭikkuḍi-paḍaittalaivaṉ) who took on lease the sheep (chemmari-veḷḷāḍu) of the temple Paḷḷimaḍai Sundarapāṇḍiya-Īśvaram in Tiruchchuḻiyal, a dēvadāna of Parittikkuḍi-nāḍu and the quantity of ghee to be supplied by them to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svastiśrī cOḻaṉṟalai koṇṭa kO vīrapāṇṭiyaṟku yāṇṭu nāṉku Itaṉetir Añcu Ivvāṇṭu parittikkuṭi nāṭṭu tEvatāṉan tiruccuḻiyal paḷḷi
maṭai cuntarapāṇṭiyaīśvarattu tēvarkku tirunontāviḷakkiṉukku Āyaṉ nāraṇaṉ na
kkaṉ vaḻi neyaṭṭuvatāka Aṭutta veṭṭikuṭi taṉ koṇṭa Āṭu pattu mēṟpaṭi cuttaṉ
Appikku Aṭutta Āṭu pattu mēṟpaṭi kōvaṉ mātēvaṉ koṇṭa Āṭu pattu mēṟpaṭi paṭāraṉ kīraṉ
koṇṭa Āṭu pattu mēṟpaṭi Araiyaṉ ṟoṇṭaṉ koṇṭa Āṭu pattu mēṟppaṭi nakkaṉ cāttaṉ koṇṭa Āṭu pa
ttu mēṟpaṭi paṭaittalaivaṉ nakkaṉ cāttaṉ koṇṭa Āṭu Irupattaiñcu mēṟpaṭi paṭaittalaivaṉ valiyāṉ cāttaṉ koṇṭa
Āṭu patiṉañcu Ēṟṟi cemmari veḷḷāṭu nūṟu mēṟpaṭiyāṉ kāri yātaṉūrāṉ koṇṭa
Āṭu pattu mēṟpaṭiyāṉ nakkaṉ yalaṉ koṇṭa Āṭu pattu mēṟpaṭi Ittēvar veṭṭi
kkuṭi taṉuvāccaṉ Appi koṇṭa Āṭu pattu mēṟpaṭi toṅkaṉ nīlaṉ koṇṭa Āṭu 10
Digital edition of SII 34.424 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
